DEFENDANT HAS OVERCOME THE REBUTTABLE PRESUMPTION THAT SERVICE WAS PROPER. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN WITH EVIDENCE THAT SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT WAS IMPROPER. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash To Vacate Default And For Any Other Proper Relief
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT TODD RUNDGREN's Motion To Quash To Vacate Default And For Any Other Proper Relief. The motion to quash is granted. Defendant has overcome the rebuttable presumption that service was proper. Defendant has shown with evidence that service of summons and complaint was improper. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash To Vacate Default And For Any Other Proper Relief
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Continued To Jan-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT COHEN, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - MR. COHEN DELIVERED COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. DEFENDANT TODD RUNDGREN'S Motion To Quash To Vacate Default And For Any Other Proper Relief. The motion is continued to January 17, 2013. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff; Michael Rooney, Esq. appearing specially for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
